sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC <> '' and not substring(CC,4,1) = 'I' and not Co like '45%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, CC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Amt5, Flex1) (select KeyID, Co, GL, CC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0))-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0))-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, round(sum(coalesce(Amt5,0)),2) as Amt5, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,GL,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0 and Amt5 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey like 'M1-3-6-06-03-%'
update TransX set Flex1 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey = 'M1-3-6-06-14-01' and not Co like '45%'
update TransX set Flex1 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey = 'M1-3-6-06-14' and Flex1 = 'pass1'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on t.Flex1 = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod, Co, GL, CC,Amt2,Amt1,Amt6) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',
insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod, Co, GL, CC,Amt4,Amt3,Amt6) values ('[batchID]','[PY][Mo]',
insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod, Co, GL, CC,Amt5) values ('[batchID]','[PY][12]',
